action_set_definitions.name: get_infrastructure_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all radio units and network nodes within a specified location.

location_id.description: The specific area name, e.g., 'Concourse C North'.

action_set_definitions.name: get_radio_performance_data
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches current performance metrics for a specific radio unit, including SNR, utilization, and retry rates.

radio_id.description: The unique ID of the radio unit.

action_set_definitions.name: get_site_noise_floor
action_set_definitions.description: Measures the real-time ambient noise floor at the location of a specific radio unit to aid in sensitivity recalibration.

radio_id.description: The unique ID of the radio unit.

action_set_definitions.name: get_constraints_and_budget
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the remaining CAPEX budget and the list of DFS-restricted channels for the current regulatory domain.

action_set_definitions.name: update_radio_settings
action_set_definitions.description: Applies new configuration settings to a radio unit, including threshold adjustments, channel changes, and data rate disabling.

radio_id.description: The unique ID of the radio unit.

rx_sensitivity_threshold_dbm.description: The recalibrated sensitivity threshold (based on noise floor).

target_channel.description: The channel to assign (must be non-DFS).

disabled_data_rates_mbps.description: List of legacy rates to disable (e.g., [1, 2, 5.5, 11]).

action_set_definitions.name: verify_area_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Performs an area-wide audit of all radios in a location to verify aggregate and individual performance targets.

state_description.topology: A graph representation of the network including nodes (routers/switches) and links.
state_description.link_utilization: Mapping of link IDs to their current percentage of bandwidth utilization.
state_description.traffic_matrix: A matrix representing current traffic demand (throughput) between all node pairs.
state_description.network_latency_ms: Average and peak latency metrics across specific paths or the entire network.
state_description.remaining_budget: The capital expenditure (CAPEX) remaining for network upgrades.
state_description.operational_costs: Current cumulative operational expenditure (OPEX) based on active equipment and power.
